chinese_news.title: 优必选超仿生机器人首发订单破万，最高售价99万元｜最前线
chinese_news.summary:
作者｜黄楠

6月30日，优必选在2026年度全球发布会，正式推出全尺寸超仿生人形机器人“优世界”U1系列，包含半身版U1 Lite、高配全身版U1 Pro及高动态全身版U1 Ultra三款产品，售价区间为11.98万元至99万元。

同时，优必选宣布，U1系列全渠道订单已累计突破13361台，成为全球首款具备规模化量产能力的全尺寸超仿生人形机器人。

chinese_news.title: 对谈小马智行彭军：一家“反共识”自动驾驶公司
chinese_news.summary:
2016年，彭军创立小马智行时，已经预料到，Robotaxi（自动驾驶出租车）从远景走进现实，实现大规模的落地，至少需要10年努力，要等待技术和法律法规的成熟，也要考虑社会的接受度。

今天，不管是在旧金山街头穿梭的Waymo，还是在深圳南山闹市区接单的小马智行车队，都证实了这一点。自动驾驶车已然融入社会化车流，开始商业运营。

但是彭军十年前可能没想到的是，制约其车队快速扩张的一个关键问题，是没有司机之后的一系列琐碎运维工作。

在人类开车时，充电、洗车、车辆维护，甚至帮顾客搬运行李，都由司机顺手干了，但是当自动驾驶车上路后，

chinese_news.title: 秋声 | 31岁学霸冲港股IPO，李泽湘成最大赢家
chinese_news.summary:
本文约2500字，建议阅读5分钟

作者 | 彭孝秋

编者按：AI大爆发之际，越来越多公司走向资本市场。每一份招股书翻动的声音里，都藏着一家公司想说与未曾明说的全部。

鉴于此，硬氪特推出「秋声」专栏。秋声取自欧阳修《秋声赋》，借“听秋声”之意，产业冷暖，辨公司成色，记录企业冲刺IPO途中那些被写下与被隐藏的真实。这是我们第五期，本末动力。

6月最后一周，本末动力（北京）科技股份有限公司通过港交所聆讯。

此次IPO，本末是以18C特专科技公司身份冲刺港交所主板，独家保荐人为中信证券（香港）。招股书显示，本末拟发行不超过约1.22亿股H股。

本末做的是“卖电机模组”生意，不同于做整机的机器人公司，本末核心壁垒在机器人关节上，即机器人直驱动力模组。相当于不需要外部减速器、直接输出扭矩的那颗集成运动

chinese_news.title: 最前线｜光子跃迁发布个人智能影像生态，推出AI戒指等产品布局多设备协同
chinese_news.summary:
6月30日，智能影像公司光子跃迁在深圳举行影像技术发布会，发布个人智能影像生态，并展示了包括运动相机LEAPTIC Cube、AI戒指在内的多款产品及未来生态规划。

光子跃迁表示，公司希望通过全链路AI能力连接不同影像设备，将传统影像设备从单纯的记录工具，升级为具备场景理解和智能协同能力的创作终端。

发布会上，光子跃迁进一步介绍了今年推出的首款产品——LEAPTIC Cube。这款产品定位为8K AI拇指运动相机，重量约55.9克，搭载1/1.3英寸传感器，支持8K/30fps视频录制和4K/120fps慢动作拍摄，并采用磁吸式模块化设计，可搭配挂脖支架、帽檐夹、自拍杆、电池模块等配件，以适配运动、Vlog等不同拍摄场景。

chinese_news.title: 告别硬件出海上一个十年，前安克CMO做了款AI时代的Memory产品｜硬氪专访
chinese_news.summary:
作者｜黄楠

编辑｜袁斯来

2024年，当王时远从工作了9年的安克辞职时，他发现自己面对的是一个全新的世界。

王时远亲历了硬件出海的黄金十年，是国内最早搭建海外营销体系、建立规则的那批人。他2015年加入安克，先做海外，后做国内，从安克CMO到转任中国区总裁，最多的时候带了四五百人的团队。

2025年，从安克离开创业时，出海硬件创业已经有一套成熟的流程：打样、上众筹、以众筹成绩去融资，最后量产。可王时远看到，这条路的ROI越来越低。众筹项目越来越多，却大部分是赔本赚吆喝。海外的营销渠道，已经从过去Meta、Google大一统，到现在散落在播客、社媒KOL各处。“ 十年前Meta能做到的事，今天做不到，Kickstarter也做不到。”王时远告诉硬氪。

粗放式的产品思路，显然已经不适合这个时代。AI硬件正在成为一个明确的浪潮，但在王时远看来，什么是AI原生产品、AI原生硬件应该长什么样，尚没有人真正定义清楚。

这正是创业公司最珍贵的时间窗口，跑

chinese_news.title: 苏大教授创业做机器人触觉系统，获松禾资本千万级天使轮融资｜硬氪首发
chinese_news.summary:
作者｜黄楠

编辑｜袁斯来

硬氪获悉，感知纪元科技有限公司（以下简称“感知纪元”）近日完成千万级天使轮融资，本轮由松禾资本领衔投资。融资资金将主要用于中试产线搭建、核心产品迭代升级及团队扩充，加速推进多模态智能触觉电子皮肤从研发走向量产。

感知纪元成立于2025年12月，感知纪元定位于机器人触觉基础设施提供商，通过自研多模态电子皮肤、触觉感知硬件及AI算法，为机器人提供完整的触觉系统。

创始人兼CTO刘瑞远为苏州大学特聘教授，师从纳米能源领域奠基人王中林院士及柔性电子先驱Takao Someya教授，长期从事柔性电子与智能传感研究，构建了从多模态材料到器件的完整研发体系。

具身智能赛道正走到落地转化的关键节点。各类实验室演示不断涌现，但想要机器人稳定落地工业、医疗等真实产业场景，适配复杂物理环境完成精细作业，触觉感知能力的短板，已经成为难以绕开的核心阻碍。

机器人拥有视觉之后，下一个决定智能上限的，将是触觉。目前，行业主流触觉方案仍停留在单点式传感器阶段，依靠压阻、

chinese_news.title: 赤子城独家投资：4人创业团队「MobAI」，推出AI互动平台「Lunaverse Stories」 | 36氪首发
chinese_news.summary:
文丨刘士武

36氪获悉，AI 创业公司「MobAI」已完成数百万元天使轮融资，由港股上市公司赤子城科技独家投资。目前，由MobAI开发的AI互动叙事应用Lunaverse Stories 已进入邀请制测试阶段。 

熟悉AI互动类产品的人应该对MobAI并不陌生。 

一年前，MobAI创始人钟文鼎（Vito）当时还在一家头部VC上班，工作之余和联创共同开发一款叫《修仙模拟器》的产品。这款产品是prompt驱动的互动游戏，玩家需要持续往里写很多提示词，对话和故事才走得下去。从产品形态上说，这种“长 context、用户主导生成”的模式对部分玩家并不友好，Vito自己玩过多次之后给出了判断：体验太累。

chinese_news.title: 8点1氪丨“史上最严电池安全令”正式施行；苹果大量机密文件遭泄露；OpenAI首款硬件曝光
chinese_news.summary:
今日热点导览

  • 客服回应蔚来APP发生大面积闪退
  • 字节跳动：2026年一季度80名员工因触碰红线被辞退
  • 兆易创新提示风险：未来可能存在股价快速回落风险
  • 董明珠：出口没做好，接下来加快改进
  • 现货黄金价格再度跌破4000美元，距1月高点已回落近30%
  • 优必选全尺寸超仿生机器人售价公布

TOP 3大新闻

“史上最严电池安全令”正式施行

7月1日起，两项强制性国家标准《电动汽车安全要求》（GB18384-2025）和《电动汽车用动力蓄电池安全要求》（GB38031-2025）将正式实施。明确实现“一键断电”的装置为物理断电装置：电动汽车安全新国标首次将“一键断电”装置定义为物理断电装置，彻底取代以往依赖软件控制的断电方式，提升了事故救援的可靠性和时效性。同时，要求车辆在静止非充放电工况下可通过驾驶员一个动作（点触、长按）响应

prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Trump's $1B+ crypto income disclosure and removal of Anthropic export controls signal pro-crypto policy momentum, but June crash ($4.5B ETF outflow) shows volatility; market is repricing tech/macro risk.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CNBC/BBC (Trump disclosure), CoinDesk (June ETF outflows), Hacker News (Anthropic export lift)

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Anthropic's valuation exceed $20B by end of 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: U.S. lifted export controls on Claude Fable/Mythos models; Hacker News signal shows sustained developer interest (Claude Sonnet 5 scored 1102, Claude Code controversy at 1922). Market pricing in AI competition and regulatory tailwind.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CoinDesk (export controls lifted), Hacker News (Claude model discussions top 1000+ scores)

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will WTI crude settle above $75/barrel on 2026-12-31?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Iran ceasefire collapsed; U.S.-Iran talks broke down; crude shipments spiked then retreated. Oil volatility is elevated; 40M barrel export surge and 20% premium Iran pricing suggest supply uncertainty.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CNBC (Iran ceasefire collapse, U.S. talks breakdown, Strait of Hormuz traffic volatility)

prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: AI model export controls lifted (Anthropic); Taiwan passing crypto/stablecoin regulations signals Asia-Pacific policy clarity; Chinese robotics (UBTech, Xiaoma) scaling rapidly. NVDA chip demand likely to remain elevated.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CoinDesk (export controls), 36Kr (UBTech 13K+ U1 orders, Xiaoma commercialization), Hacker News (Claude/AI model momentum)

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will the Fed cut rates by >100 bps by 2026-12-31?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Japan spent $74B defending yen; analysts cite rate differentials as key issue; Trump crypto income and defense/energy volatility (Iran, North Sea) may pressure inflation expectations downward by year-end.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CNBC (Japan yen intervention, Fed rate differentials, Trump policy tailwinds)

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Trump's total crypto income in 2026 exceed $1.5 billion?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Trump's 2026 annual financial disclosure filing (FEC database or official release)
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Market has not yet priced in the magnitude of Trump's crypto business growth; current $1B+ baseline is from 2025, and crypto volatility + his platform power suggest higher 2026 earnings are plausible but not yet consensus.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: Trump's 927-page 2025 disclosure showed >$580M crypto income; 2026 will be first full year post-reinstatement with expanded token/licensing portfolio.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Anthropic release a Claude model with unrestricted export status (no geo-blocking) by 2026-09-30?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Official Anthropic announcement; public availability on Anthropic API/Console without country-level restrictions
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: U.S. lifting export controls on Fable/Mythos is a leading indicator; market underestimates speed of full commercialization. Developer demand (Hacker News signal) is high; regulatory barrier has weakened.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CoinDesk reports Anthropic restored Fable/Mythos post-export-control lift; Hacker News Claude discussions dominate (4+ models in top 10 discussions).

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Taiwan's crypto exchange/platform licensing framework produce >5 live regulated exchanges by 2026-12-31?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Taiwan Financial Supervisory Commission (FSC) public register of licensed crypto platforms; Cointelegraph/local news verification
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Taiwan just passed comprehensive crypto/stablecoin regulations; first-mover exchanges in Asia-regulated spaces typically launch within 6-12 months. Market hasn't priced in speed of Taiwan becoming a regional hub.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CoinDesk and Cointelegraph report Taiwan legislature passed crypto licensing + reserve mandates; zero English media coverage of FSC implementation timeline yet.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will UBTech (优必选) humanoid robot U1 series cumulative orders exceed 50,000 units by 2026-12-31?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: UBTech official investor relations announcement or 36Kr/Yicai follow-up reporting
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: 36Kr reports 13,361 orders in first week of launch (June 30); extrapolation to 50K by year-end is plausible (~10% monthly growth) but market has zero exposure to this Chinese robotics upside. Media coverage limited to Chinese sources.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: FLAG: 36Kr exclusive shows UBTech U1 series broke 13K orders in first week, pricing $11.98K–$99K; no English media coverage yet. Chinese robotics/humanoid TAM exploding.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will BTC/ETH ratio close above 20 on 2026-09-30?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: CoinGecko or Coinmarketcap closing price on 2026-09-30 UTC midnight
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Trump's crypto income is BTC/XRP heavy (not ETH); regulatory tailwind (export controls lifting) favors application layers. June ETF outflow was heaviest in BTC spot products. Ratio compression likely if altseason materializes.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CoinDesk reports June BTC ETF outflows ($4.5B); Trump disclosure shows BTC-weighted portfolio; Anthropic export lift may trigger ETH-heavy AI app layer recovery.

investment_theses.thesis: Long BTC on Trump policy momentum and institutional legitimacy, but hedge with short duration (3-6 month perps) because June crash and Iran ceasefire volatility suggest elevated tail risk.
supporting_signals: Trump earned $1B+ from crypto in 2025; financial disclosure signals continued exposure and pro-crypto cabinet policy (CNBC/BBC)
U.S. lifted export controls on Anthropic models (CoinDesk); regulatory overhang receding
Bitcoin ETFs shed $4.5B in June; capitulation may have cleared weak holders (CoinDesk)
investment_theses.counter_view: Iran ceasefire talks collapsing; oil volatility could trigger broader macro deleveraging. China robotics boom (36Kr UBTech, Xiaoma) may pull VC capital away from crypto into hardware/AI hardware.
investment_theses.expression: BTC spot (via Coinbase/Kraken) with 3x leverage or BTC Jun2026/Sep2026 perps on Deribit; hedge 25% notional with short USDT/USDC basis trades

investment_theses.thesis: Long NVDA and Asia semi exposure (Taiwan, Japan) on AI export control lift, but unwind if Fed rate cuts materialize faster than priced.
supporting_signals: Anthropic export control lift removes headwind for U.S. AI chip demand (CoinDesk, Hacker News)
Taiwan passing comprehensive crypto/AI regulation signals pro-tech policy clarity (CoinDesk)
Japan's $74B yen intervention suggests potential for eventual Fed rate cuts; NVDA benefits from lower rates (CNBC)
investment_theses.counter_view: Japan yen defense may fail if Fed maintains higher for longer; NVDA already priced for AI tailwind. Chinese robotics and local AI (36Kr Xiaoma, UBTech) may fragment chip demand.
investment_theses.expression: NVDA outright or NVDA/QQQ call ratio; or long Taiwan Semiconductor (TSM) ADR as Asia-focused play

investment_theses.thesis: Long crude oil (WTI) via Jun/Jul2026 futures on Iran ceasefire collapse and U.S.-Iran negotiations stalling, but take profits on any sub-60 retest.
supporting_signals: Iran ceasefire broke down; U.S.-Iran talks abandoned (CNBC); 40M barrel export surge is reversing
Strait of Hormuz traffic ground to halt during conflict; risk premium re-emerging (CNBC)
Trump's energy policy (North Sea oil drilling revival, pro-fossil fuel stance) suggests extended geopolitical oil risk (CNBC North Sea article)
investment_theses.counter_view: Global demand destruction from macro slowdown (Fed tightening residual); U.S. shale production may surge if prices spike. Taiwan crypto regulation and AI export lift suggest tech capex will be strong, keeping energy demand flat.
investment_theses.expression: Long WTI crude Jun2026 futures (NYMEX) or /CL contract; size 2-3 contracts per $100K account

investment_theses.thesis: Long Asia-Pacific tech/AI hardware (implicit via Taiwan and China exposure) because export control lift opens U.S.-Asia supply chains, and Chinese humanoid robots are capturing global TAM faster than English media realizes.
supporting_signals: FLAG: 36Kr reports UBTech U1 series 13,361 orders in first week; no English coverage yet (36Kr exclusive, 2026-06-30)
FLAG: 36Kr also reports Xiaoma (Pony.ai) commercial Robotaxi operations in Shenzhen; unit economics improving
Taiwan legislature passes crypto/stablecoin regulations + Anthropic export controls lifted; Asia supply chain de-risking (CoinDesk, CNBC)
investment_theses.counter_view: Chinese robotics may remain domestic moat; Western IP protection risks high. English VC market has not yet valued these plays; local funding may dry up if macro turns.
investment_theses.expression: Long Taiwan Semiconductor (TSM ADR) or Taiwan ETF (EWT); or direct bet on Xiaomi/BYD ADR (EV + robotics exposure); avoid single-name China hardware names (high regulatory risk)

investment_theses.thesis: Long DXY (U.S. Dollar Index) if Iran geopolitical risk escalates further, but this hedge conflicts with Fed rate-cut scenario; size accordingly.
supporting_signals: Iran ceasefire talks collapsed; U.S. not meeting with Iranian delegates (CNBC)
Oil volatility spiking and reversing (Str. of Hormuz supply risk); safe-haven bid for USD likely near-term (CNBC)
Japan spent $74B defending yen; if BoJ tightens in response, USD/JPY may spike (CNBC)
investment_theses.counter_view: Trump pro-crypto policy and fiscal stimulus hopes suggest USD weakness long-term. Fed may cut rates 100+ bps by year-end, crushing DXY. This is a short-duration tactical hedge only.
investment_theses.expression: Long DXY futures or UUP ETF; position size no more than 10% of portfolio; exit if oil recedes below $70 or Fed cuts by >50 bps
